yakisoba-recipe-with-vegetables-lezzet.name: Yakisoba Recipe With Vegetables

ingredients.item: 200 gr yakisoba noodles veya ramen noodle (hazır, haşlanmış)
1 yemek kaşığı oster sosu (veya worcestershire sos)
Japon yakisoba noodle yerine ramen noodle, yumurta noodle veya spagetti kullanılabilir.
Glutensiz tercih için pirinç noodle de uygundur.
Sarımsak yerine toz sarımsak veya sarımsak ezmesi
Taze soğan yerine pırasa veya yeşil soğan
Mantar (shiitake, enoki), deniz yosunu (nori) veya bambu filizi eklenebilir.
Tavuk, karides veya tofu ekleyerek proteini artırabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Sebzeleri yıkayıp ince şeritler veya küçük parçalar halinde doğrayın.
2. Yakisoba noodle’ları paketin üzerindeki talimata göre haşlayın ve süzün.
3. Geniş bir tavada veya wok’ta susam yağını ısıtın.
4. Sarımsak ve soğanları ekleyip hafifçe kavurun.
5. Havuç, kabak, biber ve lahanayı ekleyin, sebzeler yumuşayana kadar yüksek ateşte soteleyin (yaklaşık 5 dakika).
6. Haşlanmış noodle’ları tavaya ekleyin.
7. Soya sosu, oster sosu ve ketçap ile soslayın.
8. Tüm malzemeleri karıştırarak 2-3 dakika daha soteleyin.
9. Taze soğanları serpiştirerek sıcak servis edin.
10. İsteğe göre susam tohumu veya kızarmış deniz yosunu (nori) ile süsleyebilirsiniz.
11.  Afiyet olsun.

yakitori-marinade.name: Yakitori Marinade
instructions: In a medium bowl, stir together the soy sauce, honey and sake. Mix in the pressed garlic, if using. Use as a marinade and/or a basting sauce while grilling chicken.

yalanji-dumplings-argiro.name: Yalanji Dumplings
instructions: Ετοιμάζουμε τα αμπελόφυλλα.
Βάζουμε το ρύζι σε ένα σουρωτήρι και το ξεπλένουμε κάτω από τρεχούμενο νερό να φύγει το άμυλο.
Το στραγγίζουμε και στύβουμε 1 λεμόνι, για να παραμείνει σπυρωτό και ανακατεύουμε.

yam-dish-recipe-lezzet.name: Yam Dish Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 yemek kaşığı domates salçası veya 2 adet rendelenmiş domates
2 su bardağı su veya sebze suyu
1 tatlı kaşığı limon suyu veya sirke (yer elmasının kararmasını önlemek için)
Pırasa veya arpacık soğanı (daha hafif tat)
Pul biber yerine kırmızı toz biber veya karabiber
Limon suyu yerine elma sirkesi (kararmayı önler ve hafif ekşimsi tat verir)

instructions: 1. Yer elmasını iyice yıkayıp kabuklarını soyun (isteğe bağlı: kabuk bırakabilirsiniz).
2.  Küçük küpler halinde doğrayın ve limonlu suya koyun.
3. Soğanı yemeklik doğrayın ve zeytinyağında pembeleşene kadar kavurun.
4. Havuç ve patatesleri küp küp doğrayıp soğana ekleyin, birkaç dakika soteleyin.
5. Salçayı ekleyip karıştırın, ardından doğranmış yer elmalarını ilave edin.
6. 2 su bardağı su veya sebze suyunu ekleyin, tuz, karabiber ve pul biberi ekleyin.
7. Tencerenin kapağını kapatıp kısık ateşte 20–25 dakika pişirin, yer elmaları yumuşayınca ocaktan alın.
8. Servis sırasında isteğe göre üzerine taze maydanoz serpebilirsiniz.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

yam-kai-thai-eggs-with-leftover-grains.name: Yam Kai (thai Eggs) With Leftover Grains

ingredients.prep: cut into 2-inch (5-cm) lengths, green and white parts separated
meat removed from the bone and thinly sliced (optional)

instructions: In a medium bowl, stir together the lime juice, fish sauce, 1 teaspoon of the chile paste, and the cooked grain of your choice; set aside.
Put the eggs and the remaining 1/2 teaspoon of chile paste in a small bowl and beat with a fork to combine; set aside.

In a large heavy sauté pan, heat 1/2 tablespoon of the oil over medium-high heat. Add the shallots, the white sections of the scallions, and the pork, if using, and cook, stirring occasionally, until the shallots are very dark brown and shriveled, about 4 minutes. Add the scallion greens and the remaining 1/2 tablespoon of oil and cook for 1 minute. Pour in the egg mixture and cook without disturbing for 30 seconds, then turn and stir, breaking it up a little but keeping good-size pieces together, cooking until just set, about 45 seconds. Pour in the grain mixture and cook, turning with a spatula, until heated through, about 1 minute. Serve.

yams-with-crispy-skins-and-brown-butter-.name: Yams With Crispy Skins And Brown-butter Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Slender medium garnet yams or other yams (red-skinned sweet potatoes; about 5 pounds total)
Coarse kosher salt plus additional for seasoning

instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C. Pierce each yam in several places with fork. Place directly on oven rack and roast until just tender, 40 to 50 minutes, depending on size of yams.

Transfer roasted yams to work surface. Using scissors, cut off ends of each yam, then cut skin on 1 long side and peel off in 1 piece, being careful not to break warm yams. Let yams cool to room temperature. Tear or cut skins into long ribbons, about 1 inch wide.

Cut yams crosswise into 1/2-inch-thick rounds. Arrange rounds, slightly overlapping, in 13x9x2-inch glass baking dish or other ovenproof dish. Cover yams with aluminum foil to keep moist. DO AHEAD Yams can be made up to 3 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature. Rewarm yams in 177°C oven 15 to 20 minutes before serving.

Melt butter in large skillet over medium heat. Cook until butter browns (milk solids will turn deep golden brown), stirring occasionally, 8 to 10 minutes. Carefully pour butter, including all brown milk solids, into small bowl.

Blend shallot, garlic, and 1 teaspoon coarse salt in processor until smooth, occasionally scraping down sides of bowl. Add Dijon mustard, then red wine vinegar. With motor running, gradually drizzle in butter (including browned milk solids). Season vinaigrette to taste with pepper and additional salt, if desired. DO AHEAD Vinaigrette can be made 1 hour ahead. Let stand at room temperature. Blend again 5 seconds before using.

Pour enough vegetable oil into large deep skillet to reach depth of 1 inch. Attach deep-fry thermometer to side of skillet and heat oil to 177°C. Add yam skins in batches (oil will bubble up) and fry until skins are crisp and brown, stirring occasionally, about 3 minutes. Using slotted spoon, carefully transfer yam skins to paper towels to drain. Sprinkle skins with coarse salt and pepper.
Spoon vinaigrette over potatoes. Scatter crisp skins over and serve.

yangnyeom-chicken.name: Yangnyeom Chicken
instructions: For the rotisserie chicken: Combine salt, rotisserie chicken seasoning and gochugaru in a bowl. Sprinkle all over the chickens, then refrigerate for 24 hours.
Preheat oven to 271°C.
Roast chickens for 2 hours. Let cool for 1 hour.
For the fry batter: Meanwhile, whisk together the cornstarch, flour, baking powder, garlic powder, pepper, salt and 2 1/2 cups water in a bowl until smooth. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Cut each whole chicken into 10 to 12 pieces. Lightly coat with fry batter.
Preheat oil to 163°C in a deep-fryer. Deep fry chicken until crispy, about 3 minutes.
Preheat a pan or wok with 24 ounces Yangnyeom Sauce until sauce is heated, then gently toss the chicken in the wok until all pieces are covered with sauce. Serve immediately.
Whisk together gochujang, ketchup, sugar, cola, corn syrup, soy sauce, sriracha, vinegar, chile flakes, gochugaru, granulated garlic and minced garlic in a large bowl.

yardbirds-chicken-breast-yakitori.name: Yardbird's Chicken Breast Yakitori
instructions: Trim any excess fat from the outside of the breast.
Cut the thin end of the breast into a 2-inch (5-cm) wide piece.
Cut the remaining piece lengthwise.
Then cut the resulting lengths in half.
Cut the pieces of breast so that you end up with 25 even bite-size rectangular pieces.
Starting with the thinnest pieces of meat, pinch the meat so that the shiny side faces up and skewer directly through the middle of the meat.

Repeat, being sure that the shiny side is facing up and that you are skewering directly through the middle of the meat, until you end up with five skewers with five chunks of chicken per skewer. Each skewer should weigh about 1½ ounces.
Brush the skewers with a light coating of olive oil.
Season with kosher salt.
Start with the smooth-side down over high heat, grilling until light brown, 2–3 minutes.
Rotate ¼ turn, cook on each side until lightly colored, about 1 minute per side.
Once three sides are colored, finish cooking on the last side until light brown, about 2 minutes.
Spray with sake and lightly season with salt to finish.
Garnish with wasabi and soy sauce.

yarma-soup-with-yogurt-lezzet.name: Yarma Soup With Yogurt
instructions: 1. Ayranı geniş bir tencerede tuz ve un ile iyice karıştırın.
2.  Yarmayı yıkayıp ayrı bir tencerede 10 dakika haşlayıp süzün ve ayrana ekleyin.
3.  Ayranın kesilmesini önlemek için kısık ateşte kaynayıncaya kadar tahta kaşıkla devamlı karıştırarak pişirin.
4.  Yarmalar iyice  yumuşayınca ocaktan alın.
5.  Ayrı bir tavada tereyağını eritip ezilmiş sarımsak ve salçayı ilave edin.
6.  Hafif kavurun.
7.  Hazırladığınız terbiyeyi çorbaya ilave edip 5 dakika kaynatın.
8.  Nane ve pulbiberle tatlandırıp servis yapın.
9.  Afiyet olsun.
10. Dilerseniz, sade bir şekilde sunulan yarma çorbası tarifini de deneyebilirsiniz.

yarnall-familys-fyrstekake.name: Yarnall Family's Fyrstekake

ingredients.item: A 9-inch-diameter fluted tart pan with removable bottom; decorative cookie cutters

instructions: Whisk flour, baking powder, cardamom, and salt in a medium bowl; set aside. Using an electric mixer, beat 1/2 cup butter and sugar in a medium bowl until pale and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Beat in egg yolk and milk. With mixer running on low speed, gradually add dry ingredients and beat just until thoroughly combined.
Pat dough into a ball; break off one-quarter of dough. Form each piece into a ball. Flatten balls into disks. Cover separately and chill dough disks for at least 2 hours or overnight.

Butter tart pan. Break larger dough disk into small pieces and scatter over bottom of tart pan. Using your fingertips, press dough onto bottom and up sides of pan. Use the flat bottom of a measuring cup to smooth the surface and trim the edges. Roll out smaller dough disk to about 1/8 inches thick. Using decorative cookie cutters, cut out shapes and place on a parchment paper-lined baking sheet. Cover and chill crust and cutouts for 1 hour.

Preheat oven to 350°. Pulse almonds, powdered sugar, cardamom, and nutmeg in a food processor until nuts are finely ground. Transfer dry ingredients to a large bowl. Using an electric mixer, beat egg whites and vanilla in a medium bowl until medium peaks form. Gently fold egg whites into dry ingredients.
Whisk egg yolk and 2 teaspoons water in a small bowl to blend. Fill chilled crust with almond mixture; smooth top. Arrange cutouts on top and brush cutouts with egg wash.
Bake tart until crust and cutouts are golden brown and filling is set, 30-35 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack; let cool. DO AHEAD: Tart can be made 2 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

yassoren-damat-pita-lezzet.name: Yassıören Damat Pita
instructions: 1. Un, su ve tuzu karıştırıp yoğurun.
2.  Yumuşak bir hamur elde edin.
3.  Gerekirse su ilave edin.
4.  10 dakika dinlendirin.
5. Eti kuyruk yağı ile kavurup karabiber ekleyin.
6.  Tuz ile tatlandırın.
7.  Pirinci bol suda haşlayıp suyunu süzün.
8.  Pirinç ile eti harmanlayın.
9.  Hamuru üç bezeye ayırın.
10.  Oklava ile açıp tereyağı ile yağladığınız tepsiye yerleştirin.
11.  Üzerine pirinçli harcın yarısını yayın.
12.  İkinci hamur bezesini açıp üzerine kapatın ve kalan harcı üzerine aktarın.
13. Son hamuru açın ve üzerine kapatarak ocak üzerinde çevirerek pişirin.
14.  Alt tarafı pişince başka bir tepsiye aktarıp diğer tarafını da aynı şekilde pişirin.
15.  Dilimleyerek sıcak servis yapın.
16.  Afiyet olsun.
17. Kuzu eti ile hazırlanan kuşbaşı etli pide tarifine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

yayla-soup-with-chickpeas-lezzet.name: Yayla Soup With Chickpeas
instructions: 1. Pirinci tencereye alın.
2.  Suyu ilave edip pirinçleri haşlayın.
3.  Nohutları haşlayıp suyunu süzüp pirinçlere ilave edin.
4.  Bir kasede yoğurt, un, yumurta, limon suyu ve tuzu ilave edip çırpma teliyle karıştırın.
5.  Üzerine yarım su bardağı ılık su ilave edip karıştırın.
6.  Çorbaya ilave edip karıştırın.
7.  Kaynayıncaya kadar pişirin.
8.  Tereyağını tavada eritip kuru naneyi ilave edin.
9.  Bir iki dakika pişirip çorbaya ekleyin.
10.  Sıcak servis yapın.
11.  Afiyet olsun.
12. Sade yayla çorbası tarifine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.

yayla-soup-with-sakz-tarhana-lezzet.name: Yayla Soup With Sakız Tarhana

ingredients.item: Tarhananın üzerini örtecek kadar ılık su

instructions: 1. @meralkacamer7.
2. 537 takipçiMeral KaçamerPirinçleri et suyunda haşlayın.
3.  Bir kaseye tarhanayı koyun ve üzerini örtecek kadar ılık suyu ekleyip bekletin.
4.  Çözülüp yumuşayan tarhanaya yoğurdu ilave edin ve blender’dan geçirin.
5. Kaynamakta olan et suyundan bir miktar alıp yoğurtlu harca yavaşça yedirin ve daha sonra çorbaya ekleyin.
6.  Karıştırarak kaynamasını bekleyin.
7. Tereyağını yakmadan hafif karamelize edin.
8.  Ocaktan alıp ilk sıcağı geçince naneyi ekleyin ve çorbanın üzerine dökün.
9.  Servis yaparken isterseniz ekstra üzerine yağ ve kuru nane gezdirebilirsiniz.

yeast-and-potato-bread-pastry-lezzet.name: Yeast And Potato Bread Pastry
instructions: 1. Börek hamuru için gerekli malzemeleri bir kaba alıp karıştırın.
2.  Yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur yoğurun.
3.  Üzerini nemli bir bezle kapatıp 1 saat mayalanmaya bırakın.
4.  Hamuru 12 eşit bezeye ayırın.
5.  Her bezeyi pasta tabağı büyüklüğünde açın.
6.  Üzerine (son kat hariç) tereyağı sürerek 6 kat yapın.
7.  Üzerini nemli bir bezle örtüp 20 dakika dinlenmeye bırakın.
8.  Hamurları birlikte yarım parmak kalınlığında açın.
9.  İç harcı hazırlamak için rendelenmiş patates, rendelenmiş beyaz peynir ve kıyılmış maydanozu bir kapta karıştırın.
10.  Patatesli harcın yarısını hamurun üzerine serpip yayın.
11.  Üç parmak kalınlığında şeritler kesin.
12.  Her şeridi kenarından başlayarak verev şekilde rulo yapıp sarın.
13.  İstediğiniz uzunluklar da kesin.
14.  Diğer hamura da aynı işlemi uygulayın.
15.  Yağlanmış tepsiye dizin.
16.  Önceden ısıtılmış 180 derece fırında kızarıncaya kadar pişirin.
17.  Servis yapın.

yeast-bread-lezzet.name: Yeast Bread
instructions: 1. İlk olarak mayayı ılık su ve şeker ile karıştırıp 10 dakika çözülmesi için bekletin.
2.  Ardından yoğurma kabının içine un ve tuzu ekleyip ortasına çukur açın.
3.  Çukurun içine çözünen mayalı karışımı ekleyin.
4.  Tüm malzemeleri yumuşak bir kıvam alıncaya kadar yoğurun.
5.  Kıvam tutunca hamurun üzerini nemli bezle örterek mayalanması için 40 dakika bekletin.
6.  Elinizi hafifçe ıslattıktan sonra tezgaha un serpin ve ekmek hamurunu 7-8 bezeye ayırın.
7.  Her bir bezeye elinizle ekmek şekli verip yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dizin.
8.  Fırına atmadan önce 20 dakika daha bekletin.
9.  Daha sonra bıçağın tersiyle derin çizikler atın.
10.  Son olarak ekmeklerin üzerine yoğurt sürün ve önceden ısıtılmış 220 dereceye ayarlı fırında 25 dakika pişirin.
11. Püf noktasıEkmek hamurunun yapışmaması ve rahat şekil verilebilmesi için elinizi ve bıçağı hafifçe ıslatın.
12.  Hamuru mayalama işlemi için bekletirken ortam ısısının yüksek olmasına dikkat edilmesi gerekir.
13.  Sıcak ortamlarda mayalanma işlemi daha hızlı gerçekleşiyor.
14. Ev yapımı ekmek tariflerine buradan ulaşabilirsiniz.
15.  Karadeniz usulü tam buğday unlu ekmek tarifine göz atmayı unutmayın.

yeast-buns-in-the-pan-argiro.name: Yeast Buns In The Pan

ingredients.item: 15 grμαγιά νωπή ή 1/2 φακελάκι ξερή μαγιά
15 grμαγιά νωπή ή 1/2 φακελάκι ξερή μαγιά

instructions: Πρώτα κοσκινίζουμε το αλεύρι και το αλάτι σε ένα μεσαίο μπολ.
Εάν χρησιμοποιήσετε φρέσκια μαγιά θα πρέπει να την ενεργοποιήσετ ε.
Κάνουμε λακκούβα στη μέση στο αλεύρι και προσθέτουμε όλα τα υλικά εκτός από τη λιπαρή ουσία, λάδι ή βούτυρο.
Ανακατεύουμε με μία μαλακή σπάτουλα μέχρι να έχουμε μια απαλή, ελαστική και εύπλαστη ζύμη.
Βουτάμε τα χέρια στο λάδι ή στο λιωμένο βούτυρο και ζυμώνουμε λίγο την υγρή ζύμη.
Λαδώνουμε ένα μπολ και βάζουμε μέσα τη ζύμη.
Την αφήνουμε σκεπασμένη με μεμβράνη να διπλασιαστεί σε όγκο για περίπου 1 ώρα, ανάλογα με την θερμοκρασία του χώρου.
Πασπαλίζουμε ελαφρά τον πάγκο με αλεύρι.
Βγάζουμε τη ζύμη στον πάγκο και την ζυμώνουμε ελαφρά.
Την ανοίγουμε σε χοντρό φύλλο με πλάστη πάχους 1 εκατοστό.
Χρησιμοποιούμε κοφτερό μαχαίρι ή κουπ – πατ 7,5 εκατοστών και κόβουμε δίσκους 9-10 κομμάτια.

yeast-pastry-recipe-lezzet.name: Yeast Pastry Recipe

ingredients.item: Yaklaşık 1 su bardağı sıcak su (kontrollü ekleyin, hamurun kıvamına göre)
1 adet yumurta sarısı (beyazı iç harca eklenebilir)
Kuru maya yerine instant (hızlı) maya veya taze yaş maya kullanılabilir.
Hamuru daha lezzetli yapmak için unun bir kısmını tam buğday unu veya mısır unu ile değiştirebilirsiniz.
Ilık su yerine ılık süt kullanarak hamuru daha yumuşak ve lezzetli yapabilirsiniz.
Kıyma yerine tavuk veya hindi kıyması kullanılabilir.
Et yerine peynir, ıspanak veya patates gibi sebzeli ve peynirli harçlar da yapılabilir.
İç harca lezzet katmak için pul biber, kekik veya nane gibi baharatlar ekleyebilirsiniz.
Yoğurt yerine sade kremayı veya sütü kullanabilirsiniz.
Yumurtanın sarısı yerine sadece yoğurt ve sıvı yağ karışımı sürülebilir; bu, daha hafif bir börek yapar.
üstünü süslemek için çörek otu, susam veya rendelenmiş kaşar ekleyebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Geniş bir karıştırma kabına unu alın ve ortasını havuz şeklinde açın.
2.  İçine kuru maya, tuz ve yumurta beyazını ekleyin.
3.  Ilık suyu azar azar ilave ederek yumuşak ve ele yapışmayan bir hamur yoğurun.
4.  Hamuru streç film veya temiz bir bezle örtün ve yaklaşık 40-45 dakika kadar mayalanmaya bırakın.
5. Soğanı yemeklik doğrayın ve bir tavada kavurmaya başlayın.
6.  Üzerine kıymayı ekleyip kavurmaya devam edin.
7.  Ocaktan almadan hemen önce tuz ve karabiberle tatlandırın ve harcı soğumaya bırakın.
8. Mayalanan hamuru eşit bezelere ayırın ve her birini merdane yardımıyla çok ince olmayacak şekilde açın.
9.  Hazırladığınız kıymalı harcı hamurun ortasına yerleştirin ve yarım ay şeklinde kapatın.
10.  Börekleri fırın tepsisine dizin.
11. Üzeri için yoğurt, yumurta sarısı ve sıvı yağı bir kasede çırpın.
12.  Hazırladığınız karışımı böreklerin üzerine fırça ile sürün.
13. Önceden ısıtılmış 180°C fırında, böreklerin üzeri güzelce altın rengi alana kadar yaklaşık 30-35 dakika pişirin.
14. Börekleriniz servise hazır.
15.  Sıcak olarak afiyetle tüketebilirsiniz.
16.  Afiyet olsun.

yeast-free-baked-pastry-lezzet.name: Yeast-free Baked Pastry
instructions: 1. Mayasız pişi yapımı için, ilk olarak su, yumurta ve yoğurdu bir kabın içerisine alın ve çırpın.
2. Ardından üzerine tuz, kabartma tozu ve elenmiş unu yavaş yavaş ekleyerek ele yapışmayacak bir kıvama gelinceye kadar yoğurun.
3. Hamuru iki parçaya ayırın ve merdane yardımıyla açın.
4.  Açılan hamur ne çok ince, ne de çok kalın olmalıdır.
5. Hazırladığınız hamurları bıçak yardımıyla karelere ayırın.
6. Yapışmaz tavanın içerisine ayçiçek yağı dökün ve yağ kızmaya başladığında hamurları içerisine atın.
7. Bir taraf tamamen piştikten sonra, diğer tarafa çevirin ve kızartın.
8.  Kızaran hamurları servis tabağına alın.
9.  Afiyet olsun.

yeast-free-cheese-pastry-recipe-lezzet.name: Yeast-free Cheese Pastry Recipe

ingredients.item: Beyaz peynir yerine lor peyniri, kaşar peyniri veya çökelek kullanılabilir. peynir çeşitlerini karıştırarak daha zengin bir iç harç da hazırlanabilir.
Kapya biber yerine ince doğranmış yeşil biber veya kırmızı biber eklenebilir.
Maydanoz ve dereotu yerine taze soğan veya fesleğen kullanarak farklı aromalar elde edebilirsiniz.
Siyah zeytin yerine yeşil zeytin tercih edilebilir ya da zeytin kullanılmadan sade bir hamur hazırlanabilir.
Tereyağı yerine margarin kullanılabilir. daha hafif bir tat için yarı yarıya tereyağı ve sıvı yağ da kullanılabilir.
Yoğurt yerine aynı miktarda süt veya kefir kullanarak hamura farklı bir yumuşaklık kazandırabilirsiniz.
Susam yerine çörek otu, haşhaş veya ayçekirdeği içi serpilerek farklı bir görünüm ve lezzet elde edilebilir.
Poğaçaların üzerine rendelenmiş kaşar peyniri serpiştirerek daha yoğun bir lezzet elde edebilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Geniş bir yoğurma kabına tereyağı, sıvı yağ, yoğurt, yumurta akı ve sirkeyi alın.
2.  Tüm malzemeleri güzelce karıştırın.
3. Üzerine tuz, kabartma tozu ve unu kontrollü şekilde ekleyerek ele yapışmayan yumuşak kıvamlı bir hamur yoğurun.
4. Hamur hazır olduktan sonra ince doğranmış kapya biber, maydanoz, dereotu ve zeytinleri ekleyerek hamuru tekrar yoğurun ve malzemelerin eşit dağılmasını sağlayın.
5. Hamuru yaklaşık 24 eşit parçaya bölün.
6.  Her parçayı elinizde yuvarlayarak küçük bezeler hazırlayın.
7. Bezelerden birini alın ve avucunuzla hafifçe bastırarak açın.
8.  Ortasına beyaz peynir koyun ve hamuru kapatarak oval poğaça şekli verin.
9. Hazırladığınız poğaçaları yağlı kağıt serilmiş fırın tepsisine dizin.
10.  Üzerlerine yumurta sarısı sürün ve susam serpiştirin.
11. Önceden 180 °C’ye ısıtılmış fırında yaklaşık 25 dakika, üzerleri kızarana kadar pişirin.
12. Fırından çıkan poğaçalar servise hazır.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

yeast-free-cotton-pastry-recipe-lezzet.name: Yeast-free Cotton Pastry Recipe

ingredients.item: Süt + 1 çay kaşığı sirke veya limon suyu (ekşi tatlı dengesi için)
Kefir (daha hafif ve yumuşak doku için)
Tereyağı veya margarin (daha zengin bir lezzet verir)
Tam buğday unu (daha lifli ve doyurucu)
Yarım ölçü beyaz un + yarım ölçü mısır unu (hafif farklı bir doku için)
Beyaz peynir, lor, kaşar peyniri veya rendelenmiş cheddar
Haşlanmış tavuk parçaları ile peynirli karışım
Süt veya yoğurt sürerek hafif bir parlaklık elde edebilirsiniz
Haşhaş, keten tohumu veya nigella tohumu
Karabiber, pul biber veya kuru kekik ile farklı aroma katabilirsiniz

instructions: 1. Fırını 180 derece’ye ısıtın.
2. Geniş bir kapta yoğurt, sıvı yağ ve yumurtanın akını karıştırın.
3. Un, kabartma tozu ve tuzu ekleyerek yumuşak, ele yapışmayan bir hamur yoğurun.
4. Hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar koparıp avuç içinde açın.
5. Ortasına peynirli harçtan koyup kapatın ve yuvarlayın.
6. Poğaçaları yağlı kağıt serili fırın tepsisine dizin.
7. Üzerine ayırdığınız yumurta sarısını sürün ve susam serpin.
8. Önceden ısıtılmış fırında 20–25 dakika, üzeri hafif kızarana kadar pişirin.
9. Fırından çıkan poğaçalar servis ehazır.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

yeast-free-pancake-recipe-lezzet.name: Yeast-free Pancake Recipe

ingredients.item: Beyaz un yerine tam buğday unu kullanabilirsiniz.
Unun bir kısmını yulaf unu ile değiştirerek daha farklı bir doku elde edebilirsiniz.
Glutensiz beslenenler için glutensiz un karışımı tercih edilebilir.
Suyun bir kısmını ılık süt ile değiştirerek daha yumuşak bir hamur elde edebilirsiniz.
Hamura 1 yemek kaşığı yoğurt ekleyerek daha esnek bir yapı sağlayabilirsiniz.
Beyaz peynir yerine lor peyniri kullanabilirsiniz.
Daha uzayan bir iç için kaşar peyniri tercih edebilirsiniz.
Daha aromatik bir tat için tulum peyniri ekleyebilirsiniz.
Ispanak veya pazı ile daha sebzeli bir iç hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Taze soğan ile farklı bir aroma yakalayabilirsiniz.

instructions: 1. Yoğurma kabına unu ve tuzu koyun, karıştırın.
2.  Suyu azar azar ekleyin ve yoğurmaya başlayın.
3.  Yumuşak ve toparlanan bir hamur elde edince un serpilmiş tezgaha alın, birkaç dakika daha yoğurun.
4.  Üzerini kapatın ve yaklaşık 15 dakika dinlendirin.
5. Bu sırada beyaz peyniri çatal ile ezin.
6.  Maydanozu ince ince doğrayın.
7.  Peynir ve maydanozu bir kapta birleştirin, karıştırın ve iç harcı hazır edin.
8. Dinlenen hamuru tezgaha alın, önce ikiye bölün, ardından eşit parçalara ayırarak bezeler oluşturun.
9.  Bezeleri bir tabağa koyun, üzerini örtün ve kurumalarını engelleyin.
10. Tezgahı hafif unlayın.
11.  İlk bezeyi alın, oklava ile açın.
12.  Üzerine biraz sıvı yağ gezdirin, fırça ile her yerine yayın.
13.  Orta kısmına iç harcı koyun ve eşit şekilde dağıtın.
14.  Hamurun iki yanını ortaya doğru katlayın, ardından alt ve üst kısmı kapatın.
15.  Katladığınız her yüzeye az miktarda yağ sürün.
16.  Son olarak üzerinden oklava ile hafifçe geçin.
17.  Tüm bezeler için aynı işlemi uygulayın.
18. Tavayı ocağa alın, az miktarda sıvı yağ ekleyin ve yüzeye yayın.
19.  Hazırladığınız gözlemeyi tavaya koyun.
20.  Orta ateşte pişirin.
21.  Alt yüzey kızarınca çevirin ve diğer tarafını da pişirin.
22.  Tüm gözlemeleri bu şekilde arkalı önlü kızartarak hazırlayın.
23. Sıcak servis edin.
24.  Afiyet olsun.

yeast-free-pastry-recipe-lezzet.name: Yeast-free Pastry Recipe
instructions: 1. Un ve kabartma tozu dışındaki tüm malzemeleri derin bir kaba alın ve karışım krema kıvamına gelene kadar karıştırın.
2.  Ardından unu ve kabartma tozunu ekleyerek yumuşak bir hamur elde edene kadar yoğurun.
3. Hamur ele hafif yapışan bir yapıda olabilir; eğer fazla yumuşak gelirse yarım su bardağı kadar un ilavesi yapabilirsiniz.
4. Hazırlanan hamurdan ceviz büyüklüğünde parçalar alın, ortalarına kaşar peyniri ekleyip kapatın ve şekil verin.
5.  Poğaçaları yağlı kâğıt serili tepsiye dizin.
6.  Bu ölçülerle yaklaşık 20 adet poğaça elde edilir.
7. Üzerlerine yumurta sarısı sürün, susam serpiştirin ve bıçak yardımıyla üst kısımlarına artı (+) şeklinde küçük kesikler atın.
8. Önceden ısıtılmış 180°C fansız, alt–üst ayar fırında, üzerleri güzelce kızarana kadar pişirin.
9. Fırından çıktıktan sonra kısa süre dinlendirip servis edebilirsiniz.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

yeast-risen-lantern-pie-argiro.name: Yeast-risen Lantern Pie

ingredients.item: Ξύσμα ενός πορτοκαλιού για τη ζύμη, (προαιρετικά)
Ξύσμα ενός πορτοκαλιού για τη ζύμη, (προαιρετικά)

instructions: Σε ένα μπολ βάζουμε το αλεύρι, τη μαστίχα, τη μαγιά, τη ζάχαρη, και με ένα κουτάλι τα ανακατεύουμε.
Σε μια κανάτα βάζουμε το κρασί, το νερό, και το λάδι και τα ανακατεύουμε.
Κάνουμε λακκούβα στα στερεά υλικά και προσθέτουμε τα υγρά υλικά.
Με το κουτάλι ανακατεύουμε να σχηματιστεί ζύμη.
Όταν σχηματιστεί λαδώνουμε τα χέρια και τη βγάζουμε στον πάγκο.
Ζυμώνουμε για 5 λεπτά.
Θα κολλάει ελαφρά στα χέρια, μην βάλετε άλλο αλεύρι όμως. Πρέπει να είναι υγρή.
Λαδώνουμε ένα μπολ με λίγες σταγόνες λάδι και βάζουμε μέσα τη ζύμη και σκεπάζουμε καλά.
Αφήνουμε να φουσκώσει για 1 ώρα σε ζεστό σημείο.
Πιάνουμε με λαδωμένα χέρια τη ζύμη και την ξεφουσκώνουμε στον πάγκο.
Της δίνουμε σχήμα σφαιρικό και μαζεύουμε τις ενώσεις από κάτω.
Λαδώνουμε ταψάκι 26 ή 28 εκατ.
Στρώνουμε μέσα αντικολλητικό χαρτί ή πασπαλίζουμε το ταψί με σουσάμι.
Την ακουμπάμε στο ταψί και πιέζουμε να απλώσει.
Σκεπάζουμε με βρεγμένη πετσέτα και βάζουμε σε ζεστό φούρνο στους 50ºC να ανεβεί και να φουσκώσει για 30 λεπτά.
Προθερμαίνουμε το φούρνο στους 180ºC στον αέρα.
Προαιρετικά αλείφουμε με λίγη ζάχαρη και νερό για να γυαλίσει στο ψήσιμο.
Πασπαλίζουμε με σουσάμι.
Ψήνουμε μέχρι να ροδίσει ολόγυρα γύρω στα 30 λεπτά, χωρίς να ανοιγοκλείνουμε το φούρνο.
Την αφήνουμε να σταθεί στο ταψί για 15 λεπτά.
Ξεφορμάρουμε και αφήνουμε να κρυώσει. Την τυλίγουμε με μεμβράνη για να διατηρηθεί πολύ αφράτη και μαλακή.
Στο σερβίρισμα αν θέλετε πασπαλίζετε με ζάχαρη άχνη.

yeasted-apple-coffee-cake.name: Yeasted Apple Coffee Cake
instructions: Butter a 13x9" shallow baking dish. Mix yeast, 2 Tbsp. brown sugar, and ¼ cup warm water in the bowl of a stand mixer; let sit until it foams, about 5 minutes. Whisk in egg and remaining brown sugar, then stir in 1 cup flour and mix with a wooden spoon to incorporate. Sprinkle remaining 2 cups flour over top but do not mix in. Cover with plastic wrap and let sit in a warm, draft-free spot until mixture is visibly puffed and flour has cracks in places, 60–90 minutes.

Add sour cream, orange zest, orange juice, baking powder, and salt to mixture and mix on medium speed with dough hook until smooth, elastic, and just sticking to the sides of bowl, about 4 minutes. Add 6 Tbsp. butter in 2 additions, beating well between additions; beat until a soft, slightly glossy, sticky dough-batter hybrid forms, about 4 minutes.
Using buttered fingers, pat dough into prepared pan in an even layer, spreading to edges. Cover and let sit in a warm, draft-free spot until puffed and nearly doubled in size, 60–70 minutes.

Just before dough is finished rising, preheat oven to 350°. Pulse flour, oats, brown sugar, granulated sugar, cinnamon, and a pinch of salt in a food processor a few times to combine. Add butter and process in long pulses until streusel is the consistency of moist crumbs.

Working with several slices at a time, fan out apples slightly and arrange over dough, shingling rows in different directions; sprinkle streusel over top. Bake until apples are tender and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 35–45 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool.

Whisk powdered sugar, orange juice, and a pinch of salt in a medium bowl, adding more orange juice by the teaspoonful as needed, until icing is very thick and smooth and falls back onto itself in a slowly dissolving ribbon. Drizzle over coffee cake.

yeasted-blinis.name: Yeasted Blinis

ingredients.prep: melted, plus more, chilled, for skillet

instructions: Mix yeast, ½ cup flour, 2 tsp. sugar, and 1 cup water in a large bowl. Cover and let sit in a warm place until entire surface is foamy and puffed in places, about 30 minutes. If this doesn’t happen, your yeast is past its prime; start again with a fresh package.

Add egg yolks, half-and-half, melted butter, salt, remaining 2⅓ cups flour, and remaining 3 Tbsp. sugar to mixture and whisk until smooth. Cover batter and let sit in a warm place until almost tripled in volume, 3–4 hours. (Or, to make ahead, cover and chill 8–12 hours. Bring to room temperature before proceeding.)

Whisk egg whites in a medium bowl to soft peaks; fold into batter. Melt about ½ Tbsp. butter in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Scoop in heaping tablespoonfuls of batter to make 2” blinis. Cook until bubbles form on top and bottoms are golden brown, about 3 minutes. Flip and cook until other sides are golden brown, about 3 minutes. Transfer blinis to wire racks. Repeat with remaining batter, wiping out skillet and adding more butter as needed.

yeasted-brown-butter-waffles.name: Yeasted Brown-butter Waffles

ingredients.item: (1 0.5 sticks) unsalted butter plus more for serving

instructions: Melt ¾ cup butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat and cook, stirring often, until butter foams, then browns (do not burn), 5–8 minutes. Pour into a medium bowl; let cool.
Whisk milk, buttermilk, sugar, yeast, and salt in a large bowl. Whisk in flour and brown butter; cover with plastic wrap and let batter sit at room temperature at least 8 hours and up to 12 hours.

Heat waffle iron until very hot. Whisk eggs and baking soda into batter. Coat waffle iron with nonstick spray and pour batter onto waffle iron, spreading it to cover surface (amount of batter needed will vary according to machine). Cook waffles until golden brown and cooked through.
Serve immediately with maple syrup and more butter.

yeasted-coffee-cake.name: Yeasted Coffee Cake

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal kosher salt; for table salt
ingredients.prep: use half as much by volume

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal kosher salt; for table salt
ingredients.prep: use half as much by volume

instructions: In a small saucepan, whisk milk and flour to combine. Cook over medium heat, whisking constantly, until mixture thickens to a stretchy pudding-like consistency, 2 to 3 minutes.

Using a flexible spatula, scrape hot tangzhong into the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the dough hook attachment; let cool until just warm to the touch, about 10 minutes. Add cold milk to tangzhong, followed by the flour, butter, egg yolks, sugar, yeast, and salt. Mix on low speed until dough is smooth, supple, and elastic, 12 to 15 minutes. (The dough should pass the “windowpane” test: Pull off a golf-ball-sized piece of dough and, using two hands, stretch it as thin as you can without the dough ripping. If you can see through it, the dough is ready to rest. If not, continue kneading for another 2 to 4 minutes or until the dough passes this test.)
Loosely cover bowl with plastic wrap or a damp towel, and let sit at warm room temperature (75 to 80ºF; 24 to 27ºC) until nearly doubled in size, 60 to 90 minutes.

In a small bowl, whisk brown sugar, flour, ground cinnamon, and salt to combine. Add pecans, followed by the melted butter, using your hands to toss and gently press until the mixture is sandy. Set aside.

Grease a 9-inch aluminum cake pan with nonstick spray. Line the pan with two 15-inch by 3-inch strips of parchment paper, overlapping them to form an “X” in the bottom of the pan. (There should be about 3 inches of overhang on the edges.)

When dough has risen, lightly flour top of dough and transfer to a lightly-floured work surface. Roll dough into a 9- by 16-inch rectangle. Scatter the filling evenly over the surface of the dough, and starting with the long end, roll the dough up as tightly as possible. Carefully pinch dough together along the seam to seal, and gently pat log to ensure even thickness; brush off any excess flour from the dough.

Gently coil dough around itself to create a circular shape. Cover with a clean, damp kitchen towel and let dough rest for 5 to 10 minutes to allow gluten to relax. Roll dough into a 9-inch wide circle about 3/4-inch thick, then transfer dough to prepared pan. Loosely cover with plastic wrap or damp kitchen towel and let rise at warm room temperature until dough appears slightly puffed, about 30 minutes. Tightly wrap cake pan with plastic wrap and refrigerate at least 2 hours and up to 12.

When ready to bake, remove dough from refrigerator and let rise at warm room temperature until roughly doubled in size, dough is about 1 3/4-inches tall, and bounces back slowly when gently pressed, 1 to 2 hours.
Adjust oven rack to middle position and preheat to 350ºF (175ºC).
Firmly press pecan halves into the surface of the dough, arranging them in a circular pattern around the dough. (Dough will deflate slightly—this is fine.)

Bake until light golden brown and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center of the cake registers 88°C (88ºC), 20 to 25 minutes. Remove cake from oven and, using a pastry brush, immediately brush cake with melted butter. Lift the parchment to remove the cake from the pan and transfer it to a wire cooling rack. Let cool until slightly warm, 30 to 40 minutes.

In a medium bowl, whisk confectioners sugar, milk, vanilla extract, and salt until smooth. Glaze should be thick but pourable; if glaze seems too thick, whisk in milk, 1 teaspoon at a time, until glaze is the right consistency.
Using a spoon, drizzle glaze evenly over cake. Let set for 10 minutes before slicing with a serrated knife and serving.

yeasted-poppy-seed-apple-buns.name: Yeasted Poppy Seed Apple Buns
instructions: Place potatoes in a small saucepan and cover with water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and cook, covered, until soft, 10 to 15 minutes. Drain and let cool, 15 to 20 minutes. Pass cooled potatoes through a potato ricer and set aside.
Stir 3/4 cup plus 1 tablespoon milk and yeast together in a small bowl. Let stand until creamy or foamy, about 10 minutes.

Combine potatoes, yeast mixture, flour, sugar, butter, egg, lemon zest, and salt together in the bowl of a stand mixer. Knead on low speed until dough is smooth, elastic, and detaches from the bowl, about 5 minutes; dough should be slightly sticky.
Place dough into an oiled bowl. Turn over to coat. Cover with a damp dish towel and let rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 2 hours.
In the meantime, mix apple, sugar, lemon juice, and cinnamon for filling together in a bowl. Stir until well combined. Cover and refrigerate filling.

Roll dough out on a lightly floured surface into a 12x14-inch rectangle. Spread filling evenly over dough, leaving about 1/2 inch free on each long side. Sprinkle with poppy seeds. Roll up tightly lengthwise. Brush seams with a little water and pinch to stick together.
Place the roll on a large cutting board, seam-side down. Cut into 1 1/2-inch slices using a very sharp knife.

Fit rolls loosely into a greased 10-inch round or 9x13-inch rectangular baking pan, cut-side down, with a little space between them. Cover with a clean towel and let rise in a warm place until visibly doubled in size, about 45 minutes.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 35 to 40 minutes.
Meanwhile, stir confectioners' sugar and enough lemon juice together in a bowl to make a thick, spreadable frosting.
Remove buns from the oven. Brush frosting over rolls while they are still warm.

yeasted-waffles.name: Yeasted Waffles

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: pickled onion, and/or chili crisp (for serving)

instructions: Melt ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter in a small saucepan over medium heat. Remove from heat and whisk in ⅓ cup water.

Whisk 2½ cups (313 g) all-purpose flour, 2 Tbsp. sugar, 1 tsp. baking powder, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 tsp. instant yeast, and ½ tsp. baking soda in a large bowl. Add butter mixture, 2 large eggs, and 1½ cups buttermilk; mix gently until just combined and no large pockets of dry flour remain (batter should be lumpy). Cover and let sit at room temperature until nearly doubled in volume and some bubbles appear around edges of bowl, about 2 hours, or, preferably, chill 12 hours.

Heat waffle iron on medium-high; lightly brush with vegetable oil. Pour enough batter onto iron to cover surface (about ½ cup) and cook until waffles are golden brown and cooked through, about 5 minutes. (Keep waffles warm on a baking sheet in a 200° oven if desired.) Repeat with remaining batter, brushing iron with more oil as needed.
Top waffles with 4 fried eggs, followed by sliced avocado, pickled onion, and/or chili crisp.

yeastless-baking-recipe-lezzet.name: Yeastless Baking Recipe

ingredients.item: Sıvı yağ yerine tereyağı veya margarin ile tatlı veya hafif aromalı pişiler hazırlayabilirsiniz.
Daha hafif bir seçenek için pişileri fırında de pişirebilirsiniz (180°c’de 15–20 dk, üzeri kızarana kadar).

instructions: 1. Derin bir kapta yoğurt, yumurta ve tuzu çırpın.
2. Kabartma tozunu ve unu azar azar ekleyerek yumuşak ama ele yapışmayan bir hamur yoğurun.
3. Hamuru tezgâhta hafif un serpip merdane ile yarım santim kalınlığında açın.
4. Bir bardak ağzıyla veya yuvarlak kalıpla hamurdan parçalar kesin.
5. Geniş bir tavada yağı kızdırın.
6. Hazırladığınız hamurları arkalı önlü, altın sarısı rengini alana kadar kızartın.
7. Fazla yağını çekmesi için kağıt havlu üzerine alın.

yedikule-green-salad-with-lettuce-lezzet.name: Yedikule Green Salad With Lettuce

ingredients.item: Yarım su bardağı iri kıyılmış ceviz içi

instructions: 1. Brokoliyi haşlayıp küçük doğrayın.
2.  Yeşillikleri kıyın.
3.  Cevizleri de ekleyerek büyük bir kapta harmanlayın.
4. Sos için; hardal, bal, sirke, kıyılmış sarımsak, tuz ve karabiberi bir kasede karıştırın.
5.  Zeytinyağını yavaşça ekleyip çırpmaya devam edin.
6.  Koyu kıvamlı bir sos hazırlayın.
7.  Hazırladığınız sosu salatanın üstüne döküp harmanlayın.
8. Yedikule marullu yeşil salatayı, dana rosto ile birlikte servis edebilirsiniz.
9.  Şimdiden afiyet olsun.
10. Yedikule Marullu Yeşil Salatanın Püf Noktaları Nelerdir?Tarifte kullanacağınız cevizlerin soyulmuş olmasına özen gösterin.
11.  Böylece acı tatları gidecektir.
12. Dilerseniz, brokoliyi 5 dakika haşlayıp salataya ilave edebilirsiniz.
13. Sarımsakları doğramak yerine ezerek aromatik bir tat elde edebilirsiniz.
14. Salatanın sosunu servis esnasında ekleyerek sulanmasını önleyebilirsiniz.
15. 1 Porsiyon Yedikule Marullu Yeşil Salata Kaç Kaloridir?Marullu yeşil salatanın bir porsiyonu, yaklaşık 35 kaloridir.
16.  Hafifliği ile metabolizmayı hızlandıran bu tarifi, diyet listelerine ekleyebilirsiniz.
17. Düşük kalorili ve pratik salatalar için, salata tarifleri listemizden faydalanabilirsiniz.
18.  Sofrasını renklendirmek için sunabileceğiniz rus salatası tarifini notlarınız arasına ekleyin.

yellow-chicken-adobo.name: Yellow Chicken Adobo

ingredients.item: Sugarcane vinegar or distilled white vinegar

ingredients.prep: roasted pumpkin seeds (pepitas), thinly sliced Fresno chiles, and sliced scallion (for serving)

instructions: Place bay leaves and peppercorns in center of cheesecloth and tie closed with kitchen twine; set sachet aside. Toast turmeric in a dry small skillet over medium-low heat, stirring often, just until fragrant (be careful not to let it brown), about 3 minutes. Transfer to a plate.

Cook coconut in same skillet over medium-high heat, stirring occasionally, until burnt (not browned: burnt), about 3 minutes. Grind in a spice mill or with a mortar and pestle or finely chop. Transfer to another plate.

Heat oven to 375°. Toss cauliflower and squash on a large rimmed baking sheet with 1 Tbsp. oil to coat; season with salt and pepper. Roast vegetables, tossing occasionally, until browned and tender, 30–40 minutes.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add onion, shallots, garlic, and ginger and cook, stirring often, until golden brown and very fragrant, 8–10 minutes. Add red pepper flakes and cook, stirring often, just until fragrant, about 1 minute. Stir in toasted turmeric, coconut milk, and ¾ cup vinegar. Bring to a boil and cook until liquid is reduced by about one-third, 20–30 minutes.

Meanwhile, prepare a grill for medium-high heat (or heat a grill pan over medium-high). Season chicken with salt and pepper and grill, turning occasionally, just until skin is charred (chicken will not be cooked through at this point), 8–10 minutes.

Add chicken and reserved sachet to turmeric sauce. Cook, partially covered, until chicken is tender, 60–80 minutes. Stir honey and remaining ¼ cup vinegar in a small bowl until honey is dissolved; add to braise, then add roasted cauliflower and squash. Taste and season with more salt or honey as needed.
Divide adobo among bowls and top with burnt coconut, pumpkin seeds, chiles, and scallion.
Do Ahead: Adobo can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill. Reheat gently before serving.

yellow-chicken-curry-with-coconut-milk.name: Yellow Chicken Curry With Coconut Milk
instructions: Bring water to a boil in a medium saucepan; stir in rice, cover, and reduce heat to low. Simmer until water has been absorbed, about 15 minutes. Add a few tablespoons water if rice is too firm. Remove from heat, cover, and set aside.
Meanwhile, heat oil in a large wok over medium-high heat. Add potatoes, chicken, salt, and black pepper; cook and stir until chicken is firm and no longer translucent, 5 to 7 minutes.

Stir in coconut milk, curry powder, chopped garlic, soy sauce, sugar, garlic powder, cumin, ginger, and pepper flakes with a wooden spoon until well mixed. Bring to a boil. Cover, reduce heat to low, and simmer until potatoes are very soft and curry aroma is strong, 15 to 20 minutes.
Off heat, taste; adjust curry powder, sugar, salt, and black pepper as desired. Let sit before serving over cooked rice, 5 minutes.

yellow-cupcakes.name: Yellow Cupcakes
instructions: Arrange racks in lower and upper thirds of oven; preheat to 400°. Line two standard 12-cup muffin tins with cupcake liners.

Whisk flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and baking soda in the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the whisk attachment. Add butter, buttermilk, and oil and beat on medium speed, scraping down sides of bowl, until smooth.

Whisk egg yolks, egg, and vanilla in a medium bowl until smooth. Add egg mixture to flour mixture in 2 additions, beating well between additions. Continue to beat on medium speed until mixture is homogenous and very thick, about 2 minutes.

Divide batter evenly among muffin cups, filling two-thirds full (a level ⅓ cup batter per cupcake). Bake 5 minutes, then reduce oven temperature to 350°. Continue baking, rotating pans halfway through, until cupcakes have domed and spring back when touched in the center, 20–25 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack and let cool.
Do Ahead: Cupcakes can be made 1 day ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

yellow-curry-chicken-with-jasmine-rice.name: Yellow Curry Chicken With Jasmine Rice

ingredients.prep: peeled and cubed, or more to taste
boneless chicken breast half, cut into cubes

instructions: Place potatoes into a large pot and cover with salted water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until slightly tender, 10 to 15 minutes. Drain.
Meanwhile, bring 3 cups water and rice to a boil in a medium saucepan. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until rice is tender and liquid has been absorbed, 20 to 25 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat peanut oil in a large deep skillet over medium-low heat; cook and stir red curry paste, ginger, and garlic in hot oil until fragrant, about 1 minute. Stir in coconut milk until well blended. Stir cayenne pepper, paprika, cumin, and salt into coconut milk mixture; add chicken and cook until chicken is about half-cooked, 3 to 5 minutes.

Stir chicken stock, potatoes, onion, bell peppers, carrot, fish sauce, brown sugar, curry powder, and bay leaf into coconut milk-chicken mixture; cook until chicken is no longer pink in the center, about 5 minutes. Add peas; cover the skillet and cook until peas are heated through, about 5 more minutes. Serve over cooked jasmine rice.

yellow-curry-chicken-with-vegetables.name: Yellow Curry Chicken With Vegetables

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken thighs, cut into 2" pieces

ingredients.item: . kashmiri chile powder or  0.5 tsp. cayenne pepper
. diamond crystal or  0.5 morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: shaken well,  0.25 cup reserved for serving
wild rice, or warm naan (for serving)

instructions: Toss chicken, garlic, ginger, lemon juice, garam masala, Kashmiri chile powder, salt, turmeric, and 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium bowl to coat. Chill 30 minutes.
Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high. Cook chicken until lightly browned, about 2 minutes per side (chicken won’t be cooked through). Transfer to a plate.
Cook potatoes and carrots in a medium pot of boiling salted water until just fork-tender, 12–15 minutes. Drain and set aside.

Heat oil in a medium Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium-high. Add a few mustard seeds. When seeds start to wiggle and pop, reduce heat to medium and add curry leaves (if using), asafetida (if using), and remaining mustard seeds. Cover pot and cook spices, swirling, until mustard seeds start popping more gradually, about 30 seconds. Uncover pot and return heat to medium-high. Add ginger and garlic and cook, stirring constantly, until beginning to brown, about 1 minute. Add red onion and a big pinch of salt and cook, stirring often and reducing heat if needed to prevent burning, until onion is golden brown and jammy, 7–9 minutes.

Stir in turmeric, then tomatoes and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to medium and cook, stirring often, until tomatoes are glossy and darkened in color and oil starts to separate around edges of pot, 5–7 minutes. Add coconut milk and broth and stir to combine; season with salt. Bring curry to a simmer, then reduce heat to medium-low. Cover and cook 10 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
Add chicken and reserved potatoes and carrots to curry. Return to a simmer and cook, stirring occasionally, until chicken is cooked through, 5–7 minutes. Taste and season with more salt if needed.

Divide among bowls. Drizzle with reserved coconut milk and top with cilantro. Serve with rice.
Do Ahead: Curry can be made 5 days ahead; let cool. Transfer to an airtight container and chill. Curry chicken can be made 3 days ahead; transfer to an airtight container and chill.

yellow-layer-cake-with-chocolatesour-cre.name: Yellow Layer Cake With Chocolate–sour Cream Frosting
instructions: Three 9”-diameter cake pans with 2” sides

Arrange racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 350°. Coat cake pans with nonstick spray. Line bottom of pans with parchment-paper rounds; coat paper. Whisk flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl until no lumps remain. Combine buttermilk, oil, and vanilla in a medium bowl.

Combine sugar, butter, and brown sugar in another large bowl. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean. Using an electric mixer, beat butter mixture until light and fluffy, 3–4 minutes. Add yolks and eggs one at a time, beating to blend between additions and occasionally scraping down sides and bottom of bowl.

Continue to beat mixture, occasionally scraping down sides and bottom of bowl, until almost doubled in volume and very light, airy, and pale yellow, 5–6 minutes. It’s very important that no lumps remain at this stage. (Occasional scraping of the bowl, especially the bottom, helps prevent lumps.)
With mixer on low, add dry ingredients in 3 additions, alternating with buttermilk mixture in 2 additions, beginning and ending with dry ingredients.
Divide batter evenly among prepared pans, about 3½ cups per pan. Smooth tops.

Bake, rotating cakes from left to right and top to bottom halfway through, until cakes are light golden brown, the centers spring back when gently pressed, and a tester inserted into the centers comes out with a few moist crumbs attached, 35–40 minutes.
Transfer cakes to wire racks; let cool in pans for at least 30 minutes. Invert cakes onto racks, peel off parchment, and let cool completely.

Using a long serrated knife, remove top dome and any bumps from each cake to create a flat surface. Slice each cake in half horizontally to make 6 layers total. Cakes can be baked 1 day ahead. Wrap tightly in plastic wrap and store at room temperature.

Stir chocolate and corn syrup in a large metal bowl set over a large saucepan of simmering water until melted and smooth; remove from heat. Stir sour cream, salt, and vanilla in a medium metal bowl; set over same saucepan of simmering water. Stir until mixture is warm but not hot, about 2 minutes. Add sour cream mixture to chocolate mixture; stir until smooth and glossy. Set aside.

Using an electric mixer, beat powdered sugar and butter in a medium bowl until light and fluffy, 2–3 minutes. Scrape down sides of bowl. Slowly beat in chocolate mixture. Continue beating until no lumps remain, about 2 minutes. Frosting should be smooth and shiny. Cover and chill until slightly firmed up, about 30 minutes.

Place 1 cake layer on a cake stand or large plate. Spoon ⅔ cup frosting over; using an offset spatula or the back of a spoon, smooth frosting to edge of cake, creating an even layer. Place another cake layer on top. Repeat with frosting and remaining cake layers. Spread remaining frosting over top and sides of cake. DO AHEAD: Cake can be made 1 day ahead. Cover with a cake dome and store at room temperature.

yellow-lentil-meatballs-lezzet.name: Yellow Lentil Meatballs
instructions: 1. Mercimekleri her renk için ayrı ayrı olmak üzere tamamen yumuşayıncaya kadar pişirin.
2.  Ocaktan alıp bulgurları ekleyin.
3.  Karıştırıp soğumaya bırakın.
4.  Soğuyan mercimeklere kalan bütün malzemeleri ekleyerek karıştırın.
5.  Elinizle şekil verip servis yapın.

yellow-natural-food-dye.name: Yellow Natural Food Dye
instructions: Bring 3 cups water to a boil; add vinegar and turmeric or saffron. Let steep for 10 minutes. Add eggs and let steep in solution for at least 30 minutes and up to 3 hours.

yellow-pepper-and-corn-salad-with-turmer.name: Yellow Pepper And Corn Salad With Turmeric Dressing

ingredients.prep: peeled, chopped, or  0.75 teaspoon ground turmeric
leaves separated, halved if large, or 1 large head of frisée, torn into bite-size pieces

instructions: Pulse jalapeño, turmeric, ginger, garlic, cilantro, oil, lime zest, and lime juice in a food processor until smooth with a few flecks of cilantro. Transfer to a small bowl; season with salt.

Prepare a grill for high heat. Grill corn, turning occasionally, until charred and cooked through, 6–8 minutes. Let cool; cut kernels off cobs and place in a large bowl. (Or, cut kernels from cobs and char in a dry cast-iron skillet over medium-high, 8–10 minutes.)

Heat broiler. Broil peppers on a rimmed baking sheet, turning occasionally, until blackened in spots and nearly cooked through, 12–18 minutes. Let cool; cut into 1" strips, retaining as much charred skin as possible; add to corn.

Broil tomatoes on same baking sheet, tossing once, until blackened in spots and starting to burst, about 5 minutes. Let cool. Add tomatoes, endive, and greens to corn; toss to combine. Drizzle dressing over and toss to coat; season with salt.

yellow-pepper-cream-recipe-comedera.name: Yellow Pepper Cream Recipe
yellow-pepper-cream-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de crema de pimientos amarillos
instructions: Inicia esta receta, asando los pimientos por 25 minutos aproximadamente por todos los lados. Deben quedar ahumados. Puede ser al grill, en una parrilla o en el horno.
Cuando estén listos, guarda en una bolsa plástica por 15 minutos para que suden y te sea más fácil retirar la piel.
Pasado ese tiempo, retira la piel de los pimientos y reserva.
Calienta un sartén o cazuela con un chorrito de aceite.
Toma las papas, pela y corta en cubos. Agrega al sartén y saltea un poco.
Trocea la ramita de puerro y añade a la cazuela.
Luego, incorpora los pimientos previamente pelados, el agua, el cubo de caldo de verduras, sal y pimienta al gusto. Revuelve y deja cocinar durante 10 minutos.
Apaga el fuego, retira y deja reposar por unos minutos.
Con un mixer, vas a procesar todos los ingredientes hasta lograr una crema homogénea y uniforme. También lo puedes hacer en una licuadora.
Sirve, decora con perejil y disfruta.

yellow-relish.name: Yellow Relish
instructions: Bring 1 gallon water to a boil in a large pot and dissolve pickling salt in the boiling water. Place cucumbers, onions, cauliflower, red bell peppers, and apples into a large bowl or crock and pour the boiling water over the vegetables. Allow to stand overnight and drain the next morning.

Transfer vegetables to a large stock pot and mix in sugar, vinegar, 3 cups water, flour, dry mustard powder, and turmeric until thoroughly combined. Bring the relish to a boil and reduce heat to medium-low; simmer until vegetables are cooked through and soft, about 20 minutes.

Sterilize the jars and lids in boiling water for at least 5 minutes. Pack the relish into the hot, sterilized jars, filling the jars to within 1/4 inch of the top. Run a knife or a thin spatula around the insides of the jars after they have been filled to remove any air bubbles. Wipe the rims of the jars with a moist paper towel to remove any food residue. Top with lids and screw on rings.

Place a rack in the bottom of a large stockpot and fill halfway with water. Bring to a boil and lower jars into the boiling water using a holder. Leave a 2-inch space between the jars. Pour in more boiling water if necessary to bring the water level to at least 1 inch above the tops of the jars. Bring the water to a rolling boil, cover the pot, and process relish for 15 minutes.

Remove the jars from the stockpot and place onto a cloth-covered or wood surface, several inches apart, until cool. Once cool, press the top of each lid with a finger, ensuring that the seal is tight (lid does not move up or down at all). Store in a cool, dark area.

yellow-rice.name: Yellow Rice

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
Chopped tender herbs (such as parsley or cilantro) and lemon wedges

instructions: Whisk together 2 tsp. store-bought fried onions, 1½ tsp. ground turmeric, and 1 tsp. granulated garlic in a small bowl.

Melt 3 Tbsp. unsalted butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add seasoning blend and cook, stirring often, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add 1 cup jasmine rice, rinsed until water runs clear, and cook, stirring often and reducing heat if needed to keep spices from scorching, until grains are coated and opaque around the edges, about 2 minutes.

Pour in 1½ cups water and add 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt; stir to combine. Increase heat to medium-high and bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and cover saucepan with a tight-fitting lid. Cook until water is completely absorbed and rice is tender, 15–18 minutes. Remove pot from heat and let rice sit (still covered) 5–10 minutes.
Uncover rice and fluff gently with a fork. Transfer pilaf to a platter and top with chopped tender herbs (such as parsley or cilantro) if desired. Serve with lemon wedges if desired.

yellow-salad-with-citrus-date-vinaigrett.name: Yellow Salad With Citrus-date Vinaigrette

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Mixed yellow and orange raw fruits and vegetables (such as corn
ingredients.prep: Sun Gold tomatoes, golden beets, apricots, clementines, and pineapple), halved, sliced, and/or cut into wedges

instructions: Process dates, oil, lemon juice, orange juice, mustard, and cumin in a food processor until smooth. Thin vinaigrette with water to a pourable consistency; season with salt and pepper.
To serve, spoon some vinaigrette into a shallow bowl and arrange fruits and vegetables of choice on top. Season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Vinaigrette can be made 2 days ahead. Cover and chill.

yellow-sheet-cake-with-chocolate-sour-cr.name: Yellow Sheet Cake With Chocolate Sour Cream Frosting
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Lightly coat a 18x13" rimmed baking sheet with nonstick spray. Line with parchment paper; coat parchment with nonstick spray. Whisk flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl until no lumps remain. Combine buttermilk, oil, and vanilla in a medium bowl.

Combine granulated sugar, brown sugar, and butter in another large bowl. Scrape in seeds from vanilla bean; save pod for another use. Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat until light and fluffy, about 4 minutes. Add egg yolks and eggs one at a time, beating to blend after each addition. Continue to beat mixture, occasionally scraping down sides and bottom of bowl, until almost doubled in volume and very light, airy, and pale yellow, about 5 minutes. It’s very important that there are no lumps at this stage. The occasional scraping of the bowl, especially the bottom, will help prevent lumps.

Reduce speed to low, add dry ingredients in 3 additions, alternating with buttermilk mixture in 2 additions, beginning and ending with dry ingredients. Scrape batter into prepared baking sheet and smooth top.

Bake cake, rotating sheet halfway through, until light golden brown, the center springs back when gently pressed, and a tester inserted into the center comes out with a few moist crumbs attached, 20–25 minutes. Transfer baking sheet to a wire rack and let cake cool.
Using a long serrated knife, remove any uneven edges or bumps from cake to create a flat surface.
Do Ahead: Cake can be baked 1 day ahead. Store tightly wrapped at room temperature, or freeze up to 1 month.

Heat chocolate and corn syrup in a heatproof bowl set over a saucepan of simmering water (water should not touch bottom of bowl), stirring constantly, until chocolate is melted and mixture is smooth; remove from heat.

Place sour cream, salt, and vanilla in another heatproof bowl and set over same saucepan of simmering water. Stir until mixture is warm but not hot, about 2 minutes. Add sour cream mixture to chocolate mixture and stir until smooth and glossy.

Using an electric mixer on medium speed, beat powdered sugar and butter in a large bowl until light and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Scrape down sides of bowl, then slowly beat in chocolate mixture. Continue beating until no lumps remain, about 2 minutes. Frosting should be smooth and shiny. Cover and chill until slightly firmed up, about 30 minutes. Spread frosting over top of cake.
Do Ahead: Cake can be assembled 1 day ahead; chill. Bring to room temperature before serving.

yellow-split-pea-soup.name: Yellow Split Pea Soup
instructions: Heat a large heavy pot over medium and pour in oil. Add onion and carrots, season with a five-finger pinch of salt, and cook, stirring often, until vegetables are very tender and just taking on a hint of color at the edges, about 5 minutes. Lightly crush fennel seeds with a mortar and pestle, or roughly chop them. Add fennel seeds, curry, and mustard seeds to pot and cook, stirring, until fragrant (the mustard seeds may begin to pop), less than a minute. Add split peas, stir to coat, then add stock and 4 cups water. Increase heat and bring to a boil, then simmer, stirring occasionally and adding more water if soup looks too thick, until split peas are very tender and some are starting to disintegrate, 50–55 minutes.

Mash soup with a potato masher until split peas are in small pieces and soup is textured but creamy (if you prefer a smoother soup, use an immersion blender directly in the pot). Taste and adjust seasoning with more salt.
While the soup is simmering, lightly crush coriander, fennel, and mustard seeds.

Heat oil in a small skillet over medium and cook coconut flakes and spices, stirring constantly, until spices are sizzling and coconut is golden brown, about 1 minute. Transfer to a plate, season with salt, and let cool (coconut will crisp as it cools).
Serve soup topped with spiced coconut and cilantro.

yellow-squash-and-corn-saute.name: Yellow Squash And Corn Sauté

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place corn in a large pot; cover with salted water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low; simmer until tender, 10 to 15 minutes. Drain; set aside to cool.
Meanwhile, place squash in a large skillet over medium heat; add ½ cup water. Cook until tender, 5 to 10 minutes. Drain any excess water from the skillet.
Cut kernels off cobs. Stir corn, butter, parsley, salt, and black pepper into squash; cook, stirring occasionally, until heated through, about 5 minutes.

yellow-squash-casserole.name: Yellow Squash Casserole

ingredients.prep: divided, plus more for greasing dish

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt
Sleeve ritz crackers or other buttery crackers

instructions: Preheat oven to 375°. Grease a 13x9" baking dish with unsalted butter. Melt 1 Tbsp. unsalted butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Working in 2 batches and adding 1 Tbsp. unsalted butter between batches, cook 3 lb. yellow summer squash, sliced crosswise ¼" thick, tossing often, until softened and golden brown, 8–10 minutes. Season each batch with 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt and transfer to a large bowl.

Melt 1 Tbsp. unsalted butter in same skillet. Add 1 medium onion, finely chopped, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Cook, stirring often, until onion is softened and golden brown, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to low and pour in ¾ cup heavy cream; stir to combine. Bring to a gentle simmer, then remove from heat and stir in ½ cup sour cream and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt.

Add mixture to bowl with squash, then add 4 oz. sharp white cheddar, grated (about 1 cup), ⅓ cup finely grated Parmesan, 1 Tbsp. thyme leaves, and ½ tsp. freshly ground black pepper; stir gently to combine. Transfer to prepared baking dish and spread into an even layer. Wipe and reserve skillet.

Using your hands, crush 1 sleeve Ritz crackers or other buttery crackers into coarse crumbs in a medium bowl. Melt remaining 3 Tbsp. unsalted butter in reserved skillet over medium heat. Stir in remaining ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt until dissolved, then pour over cracker crumbs. Sprinkle remaining ⅓ cup finely grated Parmesan over and toss to combine. Scatter cracker mixture evenly over casserole.
Bake casserole until golden brown on top and bubbling, 35–40 minutes. Top with zest of 1 lemon and more thyme leaves. Let cool 5 minutes before serving.

yellow-squash-dressing.name: Yellow Squash Dressing
instructions: Place squash in a pot fitted with a steamer basket over boiling water, and steam 10 minutes, or until tender.
Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease a medium baking dish.
In a bowl, mix the squash, cornbread, butter, sage, cream of mushroom soup, egg, onion, sugar, salt and pepper, and milk. Transfer to the prepared baking dish.
Bake 30 minutes in the preheated oven, or until lightly browned.

yellow-tomato-gazpacho-with-cilantro-oil.name: Yellow Tomato Gazpacho With Cilantro Oil And Avocado

ingredients.item: Champagne vinegar or white wine vinegar

instructions: Squeeze tomato juices and seeds into strainer set over bowl.
Press on seeds to extract all juice.
Chop tomatoes.
Set aside 1/2 cup chopped tomatoes, 1/4 cup cucumber, and 1/4 cup bell pepper.
Combine remaining tomatoes, cucumber, and bell pepper in processor.
Add tomato juices, onion, orange juice, oil, vinegar, garlic, and jalapeño; process until smooth.
Season with salt and pepper.
Transfer soup to bowl; add reserved vegetables.
Cover and chill overnight.
Divide soup among 6 bowls.
Drizzle with cilantro oil.
Sprinkle with avocado.

yellowtail-crudo-with-citrus-and-avocado.name: Yellowtail Crudo With Citrus And Avocado

ingredients.item: Cilantro leaves with tender stems and thin fancy crackers or crispbread
Yuzu kosho can be found at japanese markets and some specialty foods stores.

instructions: Mash avocado with garlic, crème fraîche, half of serranos, and 1 Tbsp. lime juice in a small bowl until mixture is mostly smooth; season with salt.
Hold your knife at a 45° angle and slice fish with the grain into ½" slices (use a sharp blade and aim for one long, clean stroke). Cut each slice crosswise into ½" pieces.
Combine oil, fish sauce, shallot, ginger, yuzu kosho, remaining serrano, and remaining 1 Tbsp. lime juice in a medium bowl. Add yellowtail, season with salt, and gently toss crudo to combine.
Spread avocado mixture on plates. Top with yellowtail, radish, and cilantro. Serve with crackers.

yellowtail-with-glass-noodles-and-pear.name: Yellowtail With Glass Noodles And Pear

ingredients.prep: cut lengthwise into quarters, thinly sliced crosswise

ingredients.item: Toasted white and/or black sesame seeds
Gochugaru (coarse korean hot pepper powder) or crushed red pepper flakes

instructions: Place noodles in a large bowl and pour boiling water over to cover. Let noodles soak until tender but not mushy, 10–15 minutes; drain. Rinse under cold water; snip into 2" lengths with kitchen shears and return to bowl.
Meanwhile, soak arame in ½ cup cold water in a small bowl until softened, 8–10 minutes. Drain; set aside.

Whisk vinegar, soy sauce, mirin, lemon juice, chile, and oil in a large bowl. Transfer ⅓ cup lemon-chile shoyu to bowl with noodles and toss to coat. Add pear, sweet onion, yellowtail, mint, chives, reserved arame, and 2 tsp. sesame seeds to remaining shoyu in large bowl and gently toss; season with salt.
Divide noodles among bowls and top with yellowtail mixture; sprinkle with gochugaru and more sesame seeds.
Do Ahead: Shoyu can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

yemeni-chicken-matzo-ball-soup.name: Yemeni Chicken Matzo Ball Soup

ingredients.prep: bone-in chicken drumsticks (about 2 lb.), patted dry
most of outermost skins removed, roots trimmed
crushed, or  0.75 tsp. ground fenugreek seeds

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions:
Mix cumin, coriander, turmeric, pepper, cardamom, and cloves in a small bowl to combine.
Do ahead: Hawaij can be made 1 month ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

Generously season chicken with salt. Heat oil in a large heavy pot (at least 7 quarts) over medium-high. Cook chicken, turning occasionally, until browned on all sides, 12–16 minutes. Using tongs, transfer chicken to a plate.

Reduce heat to medium. Add onion and garlic to pot. Cook, stirring, until onion is golden, about 10 minutes. Add squash, potatoes, carrots, celery, bay leaves, broth, and 3 quarts cold water, then return chicken to pot. Cover and bring to a boil, skimming any foam from surface. Add cumin, turmeric, 2 Tbsp. hawaij, and ½ cup cilantro. Reduce heat so soup is at a bare simmer, cover, and cook until chicken is very tender and broth is fully flavored, about 1 hour.
Whisk eggs, oil, cilantro, fenugreek, salt, a pinch of pepper, and ¼ cup broth from soup in a medium bowl to combine. Whisk in matzo meal; cover and chill dough until cold, at least 30 minutes.

Working one at a time, shape dough into ping-pong-size balls (about a heaping tablespoonful each) and add to soup. Cook matzo balls until they have puffed up and look light, 20–30 minutes. Ladle soup into bowls to serve.

yemenite-green-hot-sauce-zhug.name: Yemenite Green Hot Sauce (zhug)

ingredients.item: A spice mill or mortar and pestle

instructions: Remove cardamom seeds from pods; discard pods. Toast cardamom seeds, peppercorns, coriander seeds, and cumin seeds in a dry small skillet over medium-high heat, swirling often, until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Transfer to a spice mill or mortar and pestle and let cool; finely grind.
Place chiles and garlic on a cutting board and sprinkle with a large pinch of salt and smash into a paste with the side of a chef’s knife. (Or use that mortar and pestle here too.)
Transfer chile paste to a small bowl and work in spice mixture, parsley, cilantro, and oil; season with salt. Let sit 10 minutes for flavors to marry. Stir in lemon juice.
Do Ahead: Sauce (without lemon juice) can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill. Let come to room temperature before stirring in lemon juice.

yia-yias-tsoureki-greek-easter-bread.name: Yia Yia's Tsoureki (greek Easter Bread)

ingredients.item: Warm water (110 degrees f (43 degrees c))

instructions: Pour yeast into a small bowl; add warm water and 1/4 cup of flour. Stir, cover with two damp kitchen towels, and leave in a warm place until bubbly, about 2 1/2 hours.
Combine butter, shortening, and mastic in a saucepan over medium-low heat.
Stir milk and sugar together in another saucepan over medium-low heat until sugar is dissolved and mixture is warm. Remove from heat.

Pour 2 cups flour into the butter mixture and stir well. Add salt, then stir in the yeast mixture. Add 2 more cups of flour and stir well. Stir in 3 beaten eggs. Slowly add the milk mixture and 1 cup of flour and stir well. Add the room-temperature water and the last cup of flour and stir until the dough is not sticky.
Knead dough on a lightly floured surface for 20 minutes with lightly floured hands. Form dough into a ball. Cover with damp towels and let rise in a warm place until doubled in volume, about 2 hours.
Preheat the oven to 163°C (165 degrees C). Grease two baking sheets.

Divide dough into two pieces and separate each piece into three strands. Braid each of the 3 strands together to form 2 braided loaves. Place on the baking sheets. Nestle the red-dyed eggs between the strands. Brush the dough with the remaining beaten egg. Sprinkle the tops with almonds and sesame seeds.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, about 25 minutes.

yoghurt-squeeze-lezzet.name: Yoghurt Squeeze
instructions: 1. Bulguru bir kaba alın.
2.  Tuz döküp harmanlayın.
3.  Üzerine sıcak su dökün ve bir kapak kapatarak yumuşayıncaya kadar bekletin.
4.  Bulgur şişince un ekleyip karıştırın.
5.  Yumurtaları teker teker kırıp yoğurmaya başlayın.
6.  Hamuru yumuşatmak için elinize sık sık su alarak yoğurmaya devam edin.
7.  Hamurdan küçük parçalar kopartıp avucunuzda parmaklarınızın arasında sıkarak şekil verin.
8.  Tüm hamur bitinceye kadar işlemi tekrarlayın.
9.  Köfteleri kaynayan tuzlu suda yumuşayıncaya kadar yaklaşık 15 dakika pişirin.
10.  Kevgirle süzerek servis tabağına aktarın.
11.  Yoğurda sarımsak rendeleyip karıştırın ve köftelerin üzerine gezdirin.
12.  Sos için salçayı tereyağında kavurun ve yoğurdun üzerine dökün.
13.  Kuru nane serpiştirip servis yapın.

yogurt.name: Yogurt

ingredients.item: Thick yogurt with live and active cultures

instructions: Heat milk in a medium saucepan over medium heat, stirring and scraping bottom of pan often with a heatproof spatula (for a smooth yogurt, take care not to incorporate too much air), until thermometer registers 185°.
Reduce heat to low and cook milk, without stirring or letting it heat above 185°, for 20-25 minutes (it will be slightly thicker at the longer cook time).

Place pot in a large bowl filled with ice water. Stir constantly until thermometer registers 110° (don't go below). Immediately and gently stir in yogurt. Pour mixture into a 32-ounce jar. Cover jar and place in a warm spot in kitchen. Let mixture sit for 10-12 hours (do not disturb jar).
Taste yogurt. If you prefer a thicker, tangier yogurt, let it stand 5-8 hours longer. Refrigerate. Remember to reserve 3 tablespoons for your next batch!

yogurt-and-citrus-mousse-recipe-comedera.name: Yogurt And Citrus Mousse Recipe
yogurt-and-citrus-mousse-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de mousse de yogur y cítricos

ingredients.item: 1 cda de ralladura de lima y limón

instructions: Inicia tu receta agregando en un bol 200 gramos de yogurt natural.
Luego, vierte la leche condensada, el zumo de limón y la ralladura de lima y limón. Mezcla muy bien hasta que integren.
Con al ayuda de una batidora, bate las dos claras hasta que estén a punto de nieve.
Vierte las claras a punto de nieve a la mezcla de yogurt, leche condensada y limón. Integra muy bien con movimientos envolventes hasta que todo quede mezclado y obtengas una textura bien cremosa.
Sirve y acompaña con hojas de menta.
¡Disfruta!

yogurt-and-coconut-cake-teleculinaria.name: Yogurt And Coconut Cake
instructions: Unte uma forma de buraco com margarina e polvilhe-a com farinha. Ligue o forno a 180 graus. Deite os iogurtes gregos numa tigela, junte as gemas e o açúcar e bata muito bem até obter um creme fofo. Adicione de seguida o fermento, a farinha e o coco ralado e bata até ficar homogéneo.

À parte, bata as claras em castelo e envolva-as no preparado anterior. Verta para a forma e leve ao forno durante cerca de 40 minutos ou até que fique bem cozido. Espete um palito para verificar, retire do forno, desenforme e deixe arrefecer totalmente.
Mexa o leite condensado cozido até ficar cremoso e barre o bolo. Polvilhe com mais coco ralado e sirva.

yogurt-and-coconut-tart-teleculinaria.name: Yogurt And Coconut Tart
instructions: Leve ao lume um tacho com a água e o açúcar, deixe ferver durante 5 minutos e desligue o lume. Desenrole a massa areada e coloque-a numa tarteira (27 cm de diâmetro), mantendo por baixo o papel vegetal. Ajuste bem a massa à tarteira e elimine o bordo.

Numa tigela, misture as gemas com o ovo e os iogurtes gregos. Junte o coco, a farinha, a raspa de limão e a canela e mexa bem. Adicione depois a calda de açúcar, em fio e mexendo sempre. Deite este preparado na tarteira e alise.
Leve a tarte ao forno, pré-aquecido a 200ºC, por cerca de 20 minutos. Retire do forno e deixe arrefecer. Desenforme e sirva-a fria ou à temperatura ambiente, polvilhada com um pouco de coco ralado.

yogurt-and-cucumber-sauce-lezzet.name: Yogurt And Cucumber Sauce
instructions: 1. 1 diş sarımsağın kabuğunu soyup havanda ezin.
2.  2 su bardağı yoğurt ve sarımsağı çukur bir kaba alıp karıştırın.
3.  Orta boy bir salatalığın kabuğunu soyun.
4.  Rendenin ince yanıyla rendeleyip yoğurda ekleyin.
5.  50 gr cevizi havanda ezip ekleyin.
6.  50 gr beyaz peyniri rendeleyip cevizle birlikte yoğurtlu karışıma ilave edin.
7.  Yarım demet dereotunu kıyıp ekleyin.
8.  dilerseniz tuzla tatlandırıp servis yapın.

yogurt-and-orange-cake-lezzet.name: Yogurt And Orange Cake
instructions: 1. Fırını 180 dereceye ayarlayın.
2.  20 cm’lik kek kalıbını yağlayın.
3.  Un, şeker, kabartma tozu, karbonat, tuz, yoğurt, ayçiçek yağı, portakal suyu ile kabuğunu, yumurta ve vanilyayı bir kapta iyice karıştırın.
4.  Kalıba aktarın ve fırına yerleştirin.
5.  Kürdan batırıldığında temiz çıkıncaya kadar yaklaşık 25 dakika pişirin.
6.  Fırından alıp soğumaya bırakın.
7.  Kek soğuduktan sonra üzerine pudra şekeri serpiştirin.
8.  Üzerine portakal dilimleri yerleştirip servis yapın.
9. Farklı bir versiyonu için, portakallı kek tarifine göz gezdirebilirsiniz.

yogurt-and-orange-cake-a-recipe-comedera.name: Yogurt And Orange Cake: A Recipe
yogurt-and-orange-cake-a-recipe-comedera.original_name: Bizcocho de yogur y naranja: una receta clásica

ingredients.item: 1  yogur natural (usaremos el vaso como medida)

instructions: Precalienta el horno a 180°C con calor arriba y abajo.
Lava bien la naranja y ralla la parte externa, evitando la parte blanca. Exprime la naranja y reserva el zumo.
En un bol amplio, bate los huevos junto con el azúcar hasta que la mezcla esté espumosa y haya aumentado su volumen considerablemente.
Incorpora el yogur y el aceite a la mezcla de huevos, batiendo a velocidad media hasta integrar completamente.
Tamiza la harina junto con la levadura y la sal. Añade esta mezcla gradualmente a los ingredientes húmedos, mezclando con movimientos envolventes.
Añade la ralladura y el zumo de naranja, integrando suavemente hasta obtener una masa homogénea.
Prepara el molde engrasándolo minuciosamente con mantequilla o aceite y espolvoréalo con harina, eliminando el exceso.
Vierte la masa en el molde y golpea suavemente contra la superficie para eliminar posibles burbujas de aire.
Hornea durante 45-50 minutos, o hasta que al insertar un palillo en el centro salga limpio.
Deja reposar en el molde durante 10 minutos antes de desmoldar. Enfría completamente sobre una rejilla.

yogurt-and-persian-shallot-dip-mast-o-mu.name: Yogurt And Persian Shallot Dip (mast-o Musir)
instructions: Soak the musir in water for 3 to 24 hours in the fridge. Drain, rinse in cold water, and pat dry. Inspect the soaked musir, cutting out any stems that remain hard after soaking, and chop finely.
In a mixing bowl, combine the chopped musir with the yogurt, salt, pepper, and mint. Mix well.
Add the garnish if you like and serve as an appetizer or an accompaniment.

yogurt-and-red-fruit-semifreddo-teleculi.name: Yogurt And Red Fruit Semifreddo
yogurt-and-red-fruit-semifreddo-teleculi.original_name: Semifrio de iogurte e frutos vermelhos
instructions: Comece por preparar a calda: leve ao lume um tacho com os frutos vermelhos, o açúcar e um pouco de sumo de limão e deixe cozinhar até os frutos se desfazerem. Reserve.
Demolhe as folhas de gelatina em água fria durante alguns minutos. Depois, escorra-as e derreta-as em banho-maria ou no micro-ondas, sem deixar ferver. Reserve.

Bata as natas até ficarem firmes. À parte, misture os iogurtes com o leite condensado e depois as natas batidas. Incorpore a gelatina derretida, mexendo até ficar bem dissolvida. Divida este creme em duas partes e adicione 1/3 da calda a uma delas.

Numa forma de aro amovível, coloque camadas intercaladas dos cremes branco e rosa e de bolachas previamente demolhadas em café. Leve ao frio até começar a prender. Deite a restante calda na superfície do semifrio, faça os efeitos que vê na foto com a ajuda de um palito e leve novamente ao frio até ficar bem firme.

yogurt-and-sumac-sauce.name: Yogurt And Sumac Sauce

ingredients.item: Extra-virgin olive oil plus more for serving

instructions: Whisk garlic, yogurt, 2 tablespoons oil, and 1/2 teaspoons sumac in a medium bowl; season with salt.
Spoon sauce onto a platter. Place eggplants on top. Season with salt, drizzle with oil, and sprinkle with sumac.
DO AHEAD: Yogurt and Sumac Sauce can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.

yogurt-and-zucchini-pastry-lezzet.name: Yogurt And Zucchini Pastry
instructions: 1. Böreğin iç harcı için kabakları soyup rendeleyin.
2.  Rendelenmiş kabağı büyük bir kaseye alın.
3.  Yumurta, yoğurt, ayçiçek yağı ve tuzu ekleyip karıştırın.
4.  Unu çukur bir kaba alın.
5.  Süt, ayçiçek yağı, kabartma tozu ve tuzu ekleyin.
6.  Azar azar ılık su ilave ederek pürüzsüz bir hamur elde edene kadar yoğurun.
7.  Hamuru iki eşit parçaya bölün.
8.  Bir parçayı beş bezeye ayırın.
9.  Bezeleri 20-25 cm çapında açın.
